subcodes.first_line: O servant of the pure God! Thou art pure in heart and soul, for thou hast become detached from this world of water and clay and hast turned to another realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده یزدان پاک جانی و پاک دل زیرا از جهان آب و گل بیزار شدی و بجهان دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
